title: Black Panther
description: A powerful superhero film that celebrates African culture and features an incredible hero's journey.

title: The Lovebirds

title: Get Out
description: A critically acclaimed horror film that combines social commentary with genuine scares.

title: Soul

title: Encanto

title: Spiderman: Into the Spider-Verse
description: An innovative animated superhero film with stunning visuals and a heartfelt story.
